creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Visiting the Most Beautiful Place in NYC 

How to get there: Take the free Staten Island Ferry🚢 from Whitehall Terminal(Manhattan) to St. George Terminal(Staten Island), take the S40 bus🚌 for 10 minutes to the Sailor’s Snug Harbor Gate stop and you will arrive at the Snug Harbor Cultural Center🌺

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Today, I want to take you to the most beautiful place in New York City that most tourists don't know about. You'll take the free Staten Island Ferry from Manhattan, pass the Statue of Liberty to St. George Terminal, follow the signs for bus, take the S40 for about 10 minutes to this stop, get out, and you'll step into this free beautiful estate with over 17 unique gardens. This includes the Ale, the Tuscan Garden straight out of Italy, the Rose Garden, a greenhouse, a farm, and one of the only true authentic Suzhou gardens in America with a bamboo forest, moon gates, bridges, and koi ponds. There's also a food stand, delicious ice cream, lots of space for picnics, and inside of the giant estate, they have this cool free sailor's museum with ships and houseboats. This is Snug Harbor in Staten Island.
